mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and GDP indicate a weakening economy, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and GDPC1 both decline > 1% in 3 months
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite the dual decline.

mechanism_narrative: In high-inflation regimes, rising CPIAUCSL combined with low FEDFUNDS signals monetary policy misalignment, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 3% and FEDFUNDS < 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in non-farm payrolls indicates strong labor market conditions, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 40% of periods with PAYEMS growth > 50k.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production exceeding 1% signals weakening manufacturing activity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite the INDPRO decline.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts indicate strong demand for construction, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 40% of periods with HOUST growth > 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts signal robust consumer and business demand, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both rise > 2% in 1 month
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite the dual demand surge.
